title: Sweet Sultana Australian Oats Bowl
description: A quick and easy Australian dish featuring sultanas and oats, perfect for a healthy breakfast or snack. This recipe is low in glycemic index and can be prepared in under 10 minutes.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the low-fat milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add the rolled oats to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until the oats have absorbed most of the milk and have a creamy consistency.
Stir in the honey, lemon juice, and sea salt until well combined.
Add the sultanas to the saucepan and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until they are plump and tender.
Transfer the oat mixture to an earthenware bowl.
Sprinkle the chopped almonds over the top of the oat mixture.
Serve the Sweet Sultana Australian Oats Bowl hot, garnished with additional sultanas if desired.
Let the dish cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
